title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:4760:run:20260401T165231:5789 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kerne...
summary_text: 検出した範囲では、このリポジトリに `og:image` / `twitter:image` のHTMLメタ更新ポイントはありません。`X投稿` は「context reference化」、画像差し替えは `note.com eyecatch/thumbnail` フローが実装済みです。 **主要ファイル（実装入口）** - [scripts/local/social-context-reference.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/social-context-reference.sh) - [scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh) - [scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh)（`social-post` 時に quote gate） - [scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js) - [scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-compose.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-compose.py) - [scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh) - [scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js) - [scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh) - [config/integrations/local-systems.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/local-systems.json) **対象に近い既存アセット** - [docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md)（`eyecatch_image_path`, `thumbnail_prompt`） - [docs/drafts/20260401_ai-security-guideline_thumbnail.jpg](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260401_ai-security-guideline_thumbnail.jpg) - [.fugue/social-contexts/kawai_design_2038958744852394412.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/social-contexts/kawai_design_2038958744852394412.json)（X投稿参照、現状 `quotes: []`） **実行コマンド（そのまま使える入口）** ```bash # X投稿を context reference 化 bash scripts/local/social-context-reference.sh write \ --url "https://x.com/<handle>/status/<id>?s=20" \ --author "@<handle>" \ --title "<title>" \ --quote "<direct-quote>" \ --summary "<summary>" \ --output .fugue/social-contexts/<name>.json # social-post 用 Kernel artifacts 生成 bash scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh \ --issue-number <n> \ --context-reference .fugue/social-contexts/<name>.json \ --run-id <kernel-run-id> # サムネイル再生成（draft frontmatter を入力として使用） node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md # 統合フロー（thumbnail または full） bash scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh --mode execute --action thumbnail --draft-file docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md bash scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh --mode execute --action full --draft-file docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md # linked systems 経由で note-semi-auto のみ実行 bash scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh --issue <n> --mode execute --systems note-semi-auto ``` **差し替え時の実装エントリ** - X投稿由来の扱い: `social-context-reference.sh` → `bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh`。 - 画像そのものの差し替え: draft frontmatter（`eyecatch_image_path` / `thumbnail_prompt`）＋ `note-thumbnail-gen.js`。 - note.com 側反映: `note-semi-auto.sh --action upload|full`（内部で `note-draft-upload.js` が `note_eyecatch` API 呼び出し）。
